source_title: The infrared absorption spectrum of the gas phase neutral benzoic acid monomer and dimer
source_type: peer-reviewed article; gas-phase IR ion-dip spectroscopy plus DFT assignment table
notes: Metadata and abstract verify J. Chem. Phys. 119, 11180-11185, jet-cooled benzoic acid monomer/dimer spectra over 500-1900 cm-1, and DFT agreement. Assignment rows use the user-supplied table excerpt from this article, including matrix-isolation reference values.

source_title: Coverage-Dependent Adsorption Geometry of Acetophenone on Pt(111)
source_type: peer-reviewed article; IRAS plus MP2 assignment table
notes: ACS and HERO metadata verify J. Phys. Chem. C 2020, 124, 557-566. Abstract states that the article reports detailed acetophenone vibrational-band assignment based on multilayer IRAS and gas-phase MP2/aug-cc-pVQZ calculations. Assignment rows use the user-supplied table excerpt.

source_title: The FT-IR spectra of pyridine and pyridine-d5
source_type: peer-reviewed article; high-resolution gas-phase FT-IR vibrational analysis
notes: ScienceDirect metadata verifies Journal of Molecular Spectroscopy 104, 129-151. Abstract confirms high-resolution 0.06 cm-1 FT-IR spectra, path lengths up to 10 m, accurate isolated-molecule term values, and resolution of five C-H stretching modes. Assignment rows use the user-supplied table excerpt.

source_title: Vibrational Spectroscopy of Phenols and Phenolic Polymers. Theory, Experiment, and Applications
source_type: peer-reviewed review; compiled phenol vibrational data
notes: Taylor & Francis metadata verifies Applied Spectroscopy Reviews 42, 369-441. Accessible table excerpt lists measured and calculated stretching frequencies of phenol from gas-phase IR, diluted-solution IR, DF, matrix, and DFT sources.
